title: premna neurophylla
intro: Premna neurophylla, also known as Kalmegh, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, and is known to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Kalmegh has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, and is believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Premna neurophylla can be used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tablets, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
